name: unity-mcp-slots
description: Releases the Unity MCP connection slot as soon as a Claude Code session stops using the Editor.

hooks.command: case "$(uname -s)" in MINGW*|MSYS*|CYGWIN*) powershell -NoProfile -File "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/unity-relay-stop.ps1" ;; *) bash "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/unity-relay-stop.sh" ;; esac
case "$(uname -s)" in MINGW*|MSYS*|CYGWIN*) powershell -NoProfile -File "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/unity-relay-stop.ps1" ;; *) bash "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/unity-relay-stop.sh" ;; esac
